name: axos-os
// why: Pins the Codespace / Dev Container to Node 20 (LTS). Without this, GitHub Codespaces fell back to its base-image default (Node 16.20.2), which is below the Node >=20.9.0 that Next.js 16 and NestJS 11 require, so `npm run build` failed before compiling anything. The image tag is the major source of truth that must stay in sync with .nvmrc, the engines fields, and CI.
